title: LOI N°1/10 DU 16 MARS 2022 PORTANT PREVENTION ET REPRESSION DE LA CYBERCRIMINALITE AU BURUNDI
description: Burundi cybercrime prevention and repression law (Loi n°1/10, 16 March 2022) published on the ARCT (telecom regulator) site. General cybercrime legislation; no mention of post-quantum or quantum-safe cryptography.

title: ETUDE SUR L'USAGE DES TIC DANS LA GESTION DES CATASTROPHES AU BURUNDI
description: ARCT study on the use of ICT in disaster management in Burundi. No reference to cryptography or post-quantum topics.

title: Mission - ARCT
description: Mission page of Burundi's Agence de Régulation et de Contrôle des Télécommunications (telecom regulator). Describes interconnection, technical standards, and data confidentiality duties; no PQC reference.

title: ARCT (homepage)
description: Homepage of Burundi's telecommunications regulator ARCT. No post-quantum cryptography content identified.

title: Accueil - Ministère de la Communication, des Technologies de l'Information et des Médias (MINTIC)
description: Burundi ICT/communication ministry website. No post-quantum or quantum-safe cryptography content identified.

title: Le SETIC - Actualités
description: News page of the Executive Secretariat of ICT (SETIC), which coordinates national ICT policy and public-service digitization. No PQC reference.

title: RECRUTEMENT - Le SETIC
description: SETIC recruitment notice (international cybersecurity expert consultant under the PAFEN digital economy project). Mentions ICT infrastructure security; no post-quantum cryptography reference.

title: REGLEMENTATION ET SUPERVISION DES SERVICES FINANCIERS NUMERIQUE AU BURUNDI
description: Banque de la République du Burundi (central bank) page on regulation and supervision of digital financial services. No PQC reference.

title: Le système de la sécurité de l'information de la Banque certifié ISO
description: BRB announcement that its information security management system received ISO 27001 certification. General infosec; no post-quantum cryptography reference.

title: Burundi validates its first National Data Governance strategy
description: UNECA (UN body) event report on Burundi validating its first National Data Governance Strategy (Nov 2025). International-body publication; no PQC reference.

title: Secure government communications in an AI and post-Quantum era | ITU Academy
description: ITU Academy training course (Burundi eligible) on secure government communications in a post-quantum era. International-body training catalogue, not a Burundian institutional document.
